questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. Generation today has become <u>impulsive</u> and everything is wanted at instance.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The claims made by the scientists at the International Science Fair turned out to be <u>spurious</u>.̲
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Mercy
Select the most appropriate antonym of the underlined word in a sentence. A manufacturer can <u>amplify</u> the demand of a product by advertising widely.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in a sentence. We are all <u>appalled</u> that these stale items are still on sale.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Lazy
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Genuine
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Unity
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word tasty from the given sentence: My cordial, affectionate and kind grandmother used to make tasty pickles for us as we did not like bland ones.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Adequate
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Enthusiasm
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in a sentence. Andrew was a very gentle and <u>courteous</u> man with huge respect for everyone he worked with.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in a sentence. She <u>enunciated</u> each word slowly and carefully.
